discrepancy_analysis:
A. REPORTED RESULT: The paper reports a silhouette width of 0.67 for the DKFZ MPNST cohort (n=33) in Supplementary Figure 1c, representing an external validation of the MPNST molecular classification.

B. MODEL RESULT: DATA_UNAVAILABLE. The DKFZ external validation cohort (n=33) is not present in the local data deposit. Only the Toronto cohort was deposited for reproducibility.

C. CONCORDANCE: DISCREPANT — unable to reproduce because required input data is absent from the local deposit.

D. ROOT CAUSE: 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING. The DKFZ cohort is an external validation dataset that the authors analyzed but did not include in the public data deposit accompanying this paper. This is common for papers that use both institutional and external collaborator data — the external data is typically governed by the originating institution's data sharing agreements and is not redistributed.

E. MAGNITUDE: N/A — cannot compute relative discrepancy when the model has no numeric result to compare against 0.67.

F. PROPOSED FIX: Obtain the DKFZ MPNST methylation data from the original source (DKFZ / GEO accessions referenced in the paper's Data Availability statement, if any). Once the DKFZ beta matrix for the n=33 MPNST samples is available, compute silhouette widths using the same clustering assignments and distance metric (likely 1 - Pearson correlation on top-MAD probes) as used for the Toronto cohort. Without access to this external cohort, the reported 0.67 silhouette width cannot be independently verified from local data alone.

G. CONFIDENCE: HIGH that the data is genuinely unavailable in the local deposit (not a search failure); the assumptions_made note explicitly documents that only the Toronto cohort was deposited locally.
proposed_fix: Obtain DKFZ MPNST methylation data (n=33) from the original source or GEO accession referenced in the paper's Data Availability statement, then recompute silhouette widths using the same clustering and distance metric applied to the Toronto cohort.
